title: envpool
summary:
C++-based high-performance parallel environment execution engine (vectorized env) for general RL environments. 
 EnvPool is a C-based batched environment pool with pybind11 and thread pool. It has high performance 1M raw FPS with Atari games, 3M raw FPS with Mujoco simulator on DGX-A100 and compatible APIs supports both gym and dmenv, both sync and async, both single and multi player environment. Currently it supports
